Steps for Usage

When used alone, the touch-up pen can be used to cover the spot paint peeling off, as well as to prevent rust and conceal the car paint in inconspicuous places.

Use sandpaper with water to remove stains from painted surfaces and allow them to dry before touch-ups. After shaking the touch-up pen, use a brush dipped in a touch-up liquid to brush on the flawed position.

If it is not completely covered by one operation, wait for the first layer of paint to dry and then apply the second layer until the defect is completely covered, and wait for all the paint to dry on the defect.

Lightly smooth with sandpaper and water.

Steps for Usage

When used alone, the touch-up pen can be used to cover the spot paint peeling off, as well as to prevent rust and conceal the car paint in inconspicuous places.

Use sandpaper with water to remove stains from painted surfaces and allow them to dry before touch-ups. After shaking the touch-up pen, use a brush dipped in a touch-up liquid to brush on the flawed position.

If it is not completely covered by one operation, wait for the first layer of paint to dry and then apply the second layer until the defect is completely covered, and wait for all the paint to dry on the defect.

Lightly smooth with sandpaper and water.

If it is not completely covered by one operation, wait for the first layer of paint to dry and then apply the second layer until the defect is completely covered, and wait for all the paint to dry on the defect.

Lightly smooth with sandpaper and water.

Large capacity, one bottle can be used 12 times, is universal for the whole car exterior, all kinds of car paint. 2. Lotus leaf drive water, anti-fouling and easy to clean: Dust, dirt and other stains are easy to adhere to the paint surface to make the paint surface dirty, with a lotus leaf effect after coating, improve the paint surface self-cleaning and hydrophobicity 3. Improve hardness and reduce scratches: Sand erosion causes various scratches on the paint surface, forming a protective layer after coating, reducing or avoiding scratches caused by external forces and reducing the degree of damage to the paint. 4. High temperature resistance, no trace of burning: After exposure to sunlight and ultraviolet radiation, it will cause oxidative fading of the paint. After using this hand-sprayed wax, it can effectively resist the oxidative discoloration caused by high temperature and make the paint brighter. 5. Forming the coating layer, bright as new: With the use of the car, various substances in the air slowly react with the car paint to corrode the car paint, so that the paint surface is slowly dimmed, and after the coating, a coating layer is formed to restore the paint to the factory status. 6. Sealing design: Sealed with tin foil paper to prevent the road surface from being unstable and leaking during transportation. 7. Rotating nozzle: Rotate to turn off or on to avoid leakage when not in use, avoid resulting in unnecessary waste! 8. Parameters:

Product Name: Nano coating agent
Product capacity: 500ml/120ML
Storage method: placed in a cool dry place


Specification:

Material: Inorganic nano - quartz crystal plating etc

Hardness: 9H hardness

Coating Thickness: 30um

Gloss: Excellent high gloss effect, shiny as mirror

Anti-corrosion: PH tolerance: PH2-12

Heat Resistance: Up to 760 degree

Consumption: 500ML (Can be used for a large SUV)

Crystallization concentration: 62%

Features:
1. Large capacity, one bottle can be used 12 times, is universal for the whole car exterior, all kinds of car paint.
2. Lotus leaf drive water, anti-fouling and easy to clean: Dust, dirt and other stains are easy to adhere to the paint surface to make the paint surface dirty, with a lotus leaf effect after coating, improve the paint surface self-cleaning and hydrophobicity
3. Improve hardness and reduce scratches: Sand erosion causes various scratches on the paint surface, forming a protective layer after coating, reducing or avoiding scratches caused by external forces and reducing the degree of damage to the paint.
4. High temperature resistance, no trace of burning: After exposure to sunlight and ultraviolet radiation, it will cause oxidative fading of the paint. After using this hand-sprayed wax, it can effectively resist the oxidative discoloration caused by high temperature and make the paint brighter.
5. Forming the coating layer, bright as new: With the use of the car, various substances in the air slowly react with the car paint to corrode the car paint, so that the paint surface is slowly dimmed, and after the coating, a coating layer is formed to restore the paint to the factory status.
6. Sealing design: Sealed with tin foil paper to prevent the road surface from being unstable and leaking during transportation.
7. Rotating nozzle: Rotate to turn off or on to avoid leakage when not in use, avoid resulting in unnecessary waste!
8. Simple operation: One sprinkle and one wipe, easy coating

1.Intelligent Cloud Viewing System: The in-car aroma diffuser, equipped with intelligent mist technology, simulates the misty effect of Mount Fuji, dispersing fragrance through a fine mist. This creates an immersive visual experience, evoking a natural landscape.
2.6-Color Adjustable Ambient Light: A built-in multi-color LED light strip supports six ambient light effects (such as Dawn Gold, Snow White, and Volcano Red). The light automatically switches based on music, vehicle speed, or aromatherapy mode, enhancing the sense of luxury and driving experience.
3.Start/Stop with Intensity Adjustment: Linked to the vehicle's power source, the ignition automatically turns on and off, with a delayed shutdown. The aromatherapy concentration can be manually adjusted (three levels) to meet different needs and avoid overpowering or distracting aromas.
4.Premium Materials and Design: Featuring a matte metal body and a translucent atomizer pod, accented by a Mount Fuji silhouette, the diffuser combines modern aesthetics with practicality, adapting to the interior styles of most vehicle types (e.g., business and new energy vehicles).

Product Name: Mount Fuji Aroma Diffuser
Color: Black
Material: ABS
Dimensions: Base diameter 10cm x Height 5.2cm
Charging Cable: 50cm
Charging Port: Type-C
Battery Type: Aluminum Battery
Battery Capacity: 700mAh
Battery Life: Half a month
Net Weight: 167g with aroma cartridge, 147g without unit
Packaging Dimensions: 16 x 15 x 10.3cm
Product Contents: Unit, aroma cartridge, USB charging cable, instruction manual
Gross Weight (including packaging): 346g (color box packaging)

The aroma cartridges offer 300-400 hours of continuous use, and a full charge provides 20 minutes of standby time.
